title: A new house
question: 把今天课文里“远方回来、地方已经改变、现代设计让人第一眼不习惯”的线索放进家、小区或学校场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: If my aunt comes next year, she will get a surprise. Work on the room had begun before the holiday, and now it is very modern, so it looks strange to some people.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 亲戚明年来访：阿姨明年来我们家，会发现家里已经变了
options.english_template: If my aunt comes next year, she ___.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 假期后的教室：教室工程在放假前就已经开始了
options.english_template: Work on the classroom ___ the holiday.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 老街上的新图书馆：它很现代，所以有些人第一眼觉得不习惯
options.english_template: The new library is very ___, so it looks strange to some people.
